results.title: Scaling Context Requires Rethinking Attention
results.snippet: Power attention substitutes exponential in classical attention by p-th power; dominates exponential and linear attention at long context.

results.title: On the Emergence of Position Bias in Transformers
results.snippet: Decay mask introduces exponential decay into attention map with strength determined by token distances.

results.title: Long-Context Generalization with Sparse Attention
results.snippet: Attention dispersion fundamental limit in softmax transformers; softmax inevitably disperses focus as sequence length increases.

results.title: Exploring Context Window of LLMs via Decomposed Positional Vectors
results.snippet: For long texts, attention scores of LLMs exhibit long-term decay pattern as relative distance increases.

results.title: SWAA Sliding Window Attention Adaptation
results.snippet: Sliding window attention for long context.
